name: vaexcore-studio
description: Local-first desktop control system for streaming, recording, and local app integrations.

scripts.app:build:mac: npm run tauri -w apps/desktop -- build --bundles app,dmg
scripts.app:build:windows: npm run tauri -w apps/desktop -- build --bundles nsis
scripts.ci: npm run test:scripts && npm run prepare:sidecars && npm run check:sidecars && cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && npm run typecheck
